title: YVH-M
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''YVH-Ms''' were [[MSE-series|mouse droids]] made by [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] to seek and follow [[Yuuzhan Vong]] infiltrators. They had the special ability to sense Vonglife and the ability to track it as well. Several YVH-Ms were responsible for finding all of [[Nom Anor]]'s spy rings on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]] in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]].
